scripts.build:windows: npm run build --workspace=@ankillm/windows && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('Builds', {recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('apps/windows/dist/AnkiLLM Setup 1.0.1.exe', 'Builds/AnkiLLM Setup 1.0.1.exe'); fs.copyFileSync('apps/windows/dist/AnkiLLM-1.0.1-win.zip', 'Builds/AnkiLLM-1.0.1-win.zip'); fs.copyFileSync('apps/windows/dist/latest.yml', 'Builds/latest.yml'); console.log('✅ Windows Builds (.exe, .zip and latest.yml) saved to ./Builds directory');"
scripts.build:android: cd apps/mobile && npx cap sync android && cd android && .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug && cd ../../../ && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('Builds', {recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('apps/mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk', 'Builds/AnkiLLM-Android-v1.0.1.apk'); console.log('✅ Android Build saved to ./Builds directory');"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:windows && npm run build:android
